summary: Implemented fail-closed trusted native-binding evidence and routing, introduced a pure provider-neutral resolver transition core, and classified unregistered resolver starts as operator capability failures without consuming resolver budgets. Immutable rollout enforcement, full two-host core adoption/parity, metrics/alerts, and the real readiness canary remain bounded gaps.

gap_statuses.evidence: Resolved skill entries now carry an explicit implementation contract parsed from the winning content-addressed source. Native routing requires identity, digest/ref, provenance, compatible contract/core version, temporal host support, and explicit native-host permission; name-only and opaque existing refs use the portable AgentRun path. Publish metadata remains separate.

A dependency-free canonical snapshot/state/decision/terminal model and deterministic reduce_resolver_state core now exist with fail-closed unknown/degraded behavior and bounded remediation. The existing Temporal and standalone classifiers have not both been migrated to this core, and the full shared parity corpus remains absent.

gap_statuses.requirement: Immutable deployment identity and rollout safety
gap_statuses.evidence: No production worker versioning/drain enforcement or stale-worker exclusion was added in attempt 4.

Parent diagnostics now classify an unregistered MoonMind.PRResolver child as worker_capability_unavailable and record workflow type, task queue, agentExecutionLaunched=false, and budgetConsumed=false. Worker build/fingerprint distribution, metrics, and alerts remain absent.

gap_statuses.requirement: Real deployment canary and comprehensive regression evidence
gap_statuses.evidence: Unit regression coverage was added for native binding, fail-closed transitions, and capability failure classification. No parent-to-resolver readiness canary, Compose entrypoint test, restart/rollout test, or complete Temporal parity/replay corpus was added.

targeted_checks.notes: The managed image initially lacked pytest. Installed the pyproject-declared pytest test extras in the disposable job environment and reran the same focused coverage with python -m pytest.
All changed production Python modules compiled successfully.
The required Compose/canary implementation does not yet exist; running the broad integration suite would not supply the missing boundary evidence.

remaining_work: Migrate both the standalone and Temporal resolver hosts to the new pure core and add the complete provider-neutral parity fixture corpus.
Implement immutable worker deployment/version rollout, drain/recreate enforcement, and stale-worker exclusion.
Add bounded worker build/fingerprint diagnostics, registration-mismatch and child-start metrics, and operational alerts.
Implement the readiness-gating dry-run parent-to-resolver canary and the required Temporal, Compose entrypoint, restart, replay, and rollout regression coverage.
